12.reason: [The program tries to read input from "out.txt" using freopen, but the problem expects input from standard input (stdin). This causes the program to fail when "out.txt" doesn't exist or isn't provided, leading to no input being read.]

286.reason: [Closing stdin after freopen is unnecessary and may cause issues in some environments, though not directly causing the test failure. The main issue is the incorrect input redirection.]
